title: Login button does not respond on mobile Safari
body: When I tap the login button on mobile Safari the page freezes and nothing happens. Steps: open login page, tap login, observe no response.

title: Add dark mode support to dashboard
body: It would be great to have a dark theme for the dashboard so the interface is easier on the eyes at night.

title: Documentation: clarify installation steps for Windows
body: The README installation steps are unclear for Windows users. Please document the powershell commands.

title: Login button unresponsive on iPhone Safari browser
body: Pressing the login button on Safari on iPhone does nothing, the page appears frozen. Reproduce by opening the login screen and tapping login.
